targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(time_spent_minutes)/60, 1) AS 'Hours' FROM issue_worklogs WHERE id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(started_date) AND author_id IN ($author)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS 'Entries' FROM issue_worklogs WHERE id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(started_date) AND author_id IN ($author)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) AS 'Authors' FROM issue_worklogs WHERE id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(started_date) AND author_id IN ($author)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT issue_id) AS 'Issues' FROM issue_worklogs WHERE id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(started_date) AND author_id IN ($author)

SELECT COALESCE(a.name, iw.author_id) AS author, ROUND(SUM(iw.time_spent_minutes)/60, 1) AS hours FROM issue_worklogs iw LEFT JOIN _tool_jira_accounts a ON iw.author_id = a.account_id AND a.connection_id = 1 WHERE iw.id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(iw.started_date) AND iw.author_id IN ($author) GROUP BY iw.author_id, a.name ORDER BY hours DESC
SELECT started_date AS time, ROUND(SUM(time_spent_minutes)/60, 1) AS hours FROM issue_worklogs WHERE id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(started_date) AND author_id IN ($author) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(iw.started_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS 'Date', COALESCE(a.name, iw.author_id) AS 'Author', SUBSTRING_INDEX(iw.issue_id, ':', -1) AS 'Issue', REPLACE(REPLACE(iw.comment, '', ''), '
', ' ') AS 'Description', ROUND(iw.time_spent_minutes/60, 1) AS 'Hours' FROM issue_worklogs iw LEFT JOIN _tool_jira_accounts a ON iw.author_id = a.account_id AND a.connection_id = 1 WHERE iw.id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(iw.started_date) AND iw.author_id IN ($author) ORDER BY iw.started_date DESC

SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(iw.issue_id, ':', -1) AS issue, ROUND(SUM(iw.time_spent_minutes)/60, 1) AS hours FROM issue_worklogs iw WHERE iw.id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(iw.started_date) AND iw.author_id IN ($author) GROUP BY iw.issue_id ORDER BY hours DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT DAYNAME(started_date) AS day_of_week, ROUND(SUM(time_spent_minutes)/60, 1) AS hours FROM issue_worklogs WHERE id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(started_date) AND author_id IN ($author) GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(started_date), DAYNAME(started_date) ORDER BY DAYOFWEEK(started_date)

SELECT started_date AS time, COALESCE(a.name, iw.author_id) AS metric, ROUND(SUM(iw.time_spent_minutes)/60, 1) AS hours FROM issue_worklogs iw LEFT JOIN _tool_jira_accounts a ON iw.author_id = a.account_id AND a.connection_id = 1 WHERE iw.id LIKE 'tempo:%' AND $__timeFilter(iw.started_date) AND iw.author_id IN ($author) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

list.name: author
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(a.name, iw.author_id) AS display_name, iw.author_id AS value FROM issue_worklogs iw LEFT JOIN _tool_jira_accounts a ON iw.author_id = a.account_id AND a.connection_id = 1 WHERE iw.id LIKE 'tempo:%'
